---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability, marker, or improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Use case
<!-- What biological problem are you trying to solve? Which organism or metabolism is currently not covered or covered incompletely? -->

## Suggested approach
<!-- Detection markers (specific enzymes / UniProt accessions if known), recipe routing logic, etc. If proposing a new marker, the gold-standard pattern is verified curation: see data/diagnostic_markers/REFERENCE_CURATION.md -->

## Alternatives considered
<!-- What else could work? Why is this approach preferred? -->

## Validation strategy
<!-- How would you test that this works correctly?
  - Test-set genome that should fire
  - Sentinel organism (gid=900+ pattern) for positive-control validation
  - Cross-reactivity scan against the 26-organism test set
  - Recipe-composer behavior expected
-->

## Related context
<!-- Link to relevant LIMITATIONS.md entries, prior issues/PRs, papers describing the metabolism, etc. -->

## Pre-publication coordination
<!-- For substantive new-capability proposals: have you discussed this with the project maintainer? Major contributions during the pre-publication phase need attribution coordination. -->
